reviews.comment:
Buena atención en la estación de servicio
Muy buenos los sándwiches del bar.
Todos productos caseros y esmerada atención de la confitería.
Precios acorde a la calidad del producto.
Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the gas station.
The sandwiches at the bar are very good.
All products are homemade, and the confectionery staff provides attentive service.
Prices are in line with the quality of the products. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1a1p6SWNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Estación muy vieja, surtidores antiguos, 1 sola persona para atender, no hay aire, sin servicios (agua, aceite,  vidrios, etc)... para nada recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Very old station, outdated pumps, only one person to attend to you, no air conditioning, no services (water, oil, glass, etc.)... not recommended at all

reviews.comment:
No podés circular x la Rta 3 sin hacer un alto acá, se han hecho famosos por sus excelentes, maravillosos sándwiches ya sea para el viaje ó para llevar al destino que tengas,

(Translated by Google)
You can't drive along Route 3 without stopping here; they've become famous for their excellent, wonderful sandwiches, whether for your trip or to take to your destination.
